prompt: Create a dark cinematic medieval fantasy battlefield scene titled by mood as a confrontation with the enemy king. Three main figures stand in a tense triangular standoff amid smoke, ash, banners, soldiers, and battlefield debris. On the left stands a blonde female knight commander, facing slightly toward the center, wearing ornate polished silver plate armor with engraved patterns, a pale weathered cloak, chainmail details, leather belts, and a sheathed side weapon; she holds one long steel sword angled downward in her right hand. In the center stands a tall muscular shirtless warrior with long wet black hair, bare-chested, scarred and muddy, wearing ragged black furs and leather straps around the waist, heavy boots, and holding one blood-darkened sword downward, his posture defiant and exhausted. On the right, seen mostly from behind and in three-quarter view, stands a towering dark king in black and gold armor, wearing a spiked golden-black crown, long black hair, imposing black plate armor covered in intricate gold filigree, and a heavy black cape embroidered with gold ornamentation; he faces the two warriors like a sovereign antagonist. Count exactly 3 primary characters: left silver knight, center shirtless warrior, right crowned enemy king. Include exactly 2 clearly visible drawn swords, both held downward by the left and center figures. The setting is a devastated medieval battlefield with ranks of blurred soldiers in armor behind them, tall spear tips, torn black banners bearing faded gold heraldic designs, smoky gray sky, drifting embers, mud, broken shields, helmets, and scattered weapons in the foreground. Use a gritty high-detail realistic style with dramatic low-angle composition, shallow depth of field, volumetric smoke, muted gray-brown color grading, metallic highlights, dark fantasy atmosphere, and epic movie poster lighting. No readable modern text, no clean studio background, no cartoon style.
